mapper.select: SELECT user_code AS userCode, login_id AS loginId, user_name AS userName, email AS email, phone_number AS phoneNumber, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(user_code, '^USR-[0-9]{8}-[0-9]+$') THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(user_code, 5, 8), 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') END AS requestedAt FROM users WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND status = 'a1' ORDER BY user_code ASC
